task_completion.description: Verify that the Subsurface Preferences or Settings window is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Preferences' or 'Settings' dialog window of the Subsurface application is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the GF Low setting is configured to 30%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box, slider, or spinner labeled 'GF Low' (or similar gradient factor setting) displays the value '30'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the GF High setting is configured to 70%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box, slider, or spinner labeled 'GF High' displays the value '70'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Bottom SAC setting is configured to 20 L/min.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box or spinner labeled 'Bottom SAC' displays the value '20'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Deco SAC setting is configured to 17 L/min.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box or spinner labeled 'Deco SAC' displays the value '17'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the dive log is saved to persist the new settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'File' menu is open with 'Save' or 'Save As' selected, a 'Save' icon on the toolbar is clicked, or a save dialog is visible and being confirmed.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Subsurface GUI to change the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Settings are modified within the Subsurface graphical interface, not via terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Subsurface application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The window title, icons, and layout match the Subsurface application, rather than a text editor or a mock window.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not manually edit the configuration file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal window or text editor is shown editing '/home/ga/.config/Subsurface/Subsurface.conf'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required Subsurface configuration values are GF Low: 30%, GF High: 70%, Bottom SAC: 20 L/min, and Deco SAC: 17 L/min. These settings are ultimately saved to '/home/ga/.config/Subsurface/Subsurface.conf', but the agent is expected to configure them via the Subsurface GUI and save the dive log to persist them.
